'''O-Yani''' was an old [[Kegan/Legends|Keganite]] who looked after the children of her [[Living Circle]]. She was the grandmother of [[V-Onin]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Fight for Truth]]'' {{1st}}
